ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion from which the data is derived */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the recorded demographic data */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender represented in the data */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group represented in the data */,
  "sex_ratio" REAL /* Sex ratio calculated for the corresponding demographic data */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the given demographic */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the demographic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the subregion is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the subregion */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the subregion in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0, 1_4, 5_9) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., male, female) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex_ratios" (
  "sex_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex ratio entry */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic record */,
  "sex_ratio_value" REAL /* Calculated sex ratio value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sex_ratios_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
